title: Content Digests, Near-Duplicate Evidence, Change Classes, and History · Contract Triage
summary: A preserved Go crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, transport, body, tokenizer, goquery, frontier, goroutine, Colly callback, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first broken invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in multi-stage versioned content evidence store and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evi…
objectives: Label raw, decoded, DOM, selected-content, record, and rendered digests with algorithm and transformation version.
Distinguish URL alias, byte identity, admitted-record equality, replay, and observation duplication while retaining lineage.
Use token and structure features, thresholds, counterexamples, false-merge sampling, and stakeholder consequences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Digest Stage
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 1484 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate digest stages, exact and near identity, change classes, versions, tombstones, and deletion; release evidence binds source, modules, build settings, binary or image, configuration, policy, and restored state; then inject one session, secret, SSRF, output, path, log, privacy, or retention fault and contain every derivative. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Label raw, decoded, DOM, selected-content, record, and rendered digests with algorithm and transformation version.

Inspect the Digest Stage trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Version Tombstone
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: crawler-go-version-tombstone-1paeud" that uses case 3943 to separate digest stages, exact and near identity, change classes, versions, tombstones, and deletion. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, import x/net/html, goquery, Colly, or robotstxt, access host files, retain credentials, launch processes or unbounded goroutines, or claim native parser, race, load, accessibility, privacy, legal, container, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5, x/net 0.57.0, goquery 1.12.0, Colly 2.3.0, robotstxt 1.1.2, original fixtures, custom RoundTrippers, httptest servers, controlled DNS and browser-service environments, race and fuzz runs, subprocesses, inspected binaries and containers, accessibility review, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, legal review, and release gates.
